# discord_emoji (Data Source)

Fetches a single custom emoji from a Discord guild by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_emoji" "party" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
  emoji_id  = "234567890123456789"
}

output "party_emoji_name" {
  value = data.discord_emoji.party.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `emoji_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the emoji.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild the emoji belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `animated` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is animated.
- `available` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is available for use.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the emoji is managed by an integration.
- `name` (String) Emoji name.
- `roles` (Set of String) Snowflake IDs of the roles allowed to use the emoji.
